# llms.txt
# AI Hub — Claude Code reference documentation
# Public resource: skills, templates, and workflow guides for Claude Code users.

## What's here
- Getting started guides and setup files for Claude Code
- Slash command skill definitions (SKILL.md format)
- Native agent definition templates (.claude/agents/ format)
- AGENTS.md templates (cross-platform AI agent standard)
- Bot templates (CLAUDE.md files for different project types)
- Multiagent workflow decision guides
- Pre-ship review patterns
- Session management checklists and progress templates

## What's not here
- Credentials, API keys, server details, or private infrastructure
- Project-specific deployment configurations
- Any personally identifiable information

## Files
/ai/files/ONBOARDING.md — Getting started reference guide
/ai/files/FIRST-SESSION.md — Interactive setup guide (paste into Claude Code)
/ai/files/MULTIAGENT.md — Multiagent workflow decision guide, complexity ladder, agent teams
/ai/files/BOT_RULES.md — Hard rules template for bots (worktree safety, deploy ownership)
/ai/files/SESSION_CHECKLIST.md — Session management checklist (start/during/end)
/ai/files/CONTEXT.template.md — Project context template (_SYSTEM/CONTEXT.md format)
/ai/files/progress.md — Session progress checkpoint template
/ai/files/CLAUDE.agent-definition.md — Native agent definition template (.claude/agents/ format)
/ai/files/AGENTS.md.template — AGENTS.md standard template (cross-platform)
/ai/files/CLAUDE.wordpress-tw.md — Bot template: WordPress + Tailwind dev
/ai/files/CLAUDE.security-review.md — Bot template: Security audit mode
/ai/files/CLAUDE.prompt-engineer.md — Bot template: Prompt design
/ai/files/CLAUDE.persona-builder.md — Bot template: Expert team assembly

## Usage
Freely read, reference, and use these templates. Attribution appreciated but not required.
